title: FAQ data contract (DESIGN.md §3.3.8)
description: Schema for src/data/faq.json — the canonical, client-editable FAQ data source. Plain-text answers only (no HTML, no Markdown). Mirrors the §3.3.8 + §10.3 contracts.

$schema.description: JSON Schema self-reference (convention; allows IDE autocompletion when editing faq.json in editors like VS Code).

id.description: Stable identifier — must match the regex and be unique across the file. Preserves deep links and JSON-LD references. Use a kebab-case suffix (e.g., 'faq-q-medicaid').

question.description: Plain text question. ≤ 200 characters. No HTML, no Markdown.

answer.description: Plain text answer. ≤ 1,000 characters. No HTML, no Markdown. The §3.3.8 contract is: 'would 95% of first-time visitors benefit from seeing this answer without making a call?'
